services_available.intro:
I offer a comprehensive range of psychological services related to the neurodiversity-affirming identification and support of various forms of neurodivergence. I also assess and treat forms of learning, emotional, behavioral, mental health, and other psychological difficulties.

In addition to offering individual therapy, consultation and assessment services, I also provide specialised support for:
services_available.closing: I work with clients of all ages to develop developmentally appropriate evidence-based plans to help individuals work to their potentials in all settings, while addressing any barriers that might be standing in the way of navigating life's challenges.
services_available.liaison_note: I also liaise with external professionals and refer clients — where necessary — for other specialist services (e.g., Speech and Language Therapy, Occupational Therapy, Psychiatry, etc.).

about_stephen:
I am a registered clinical psychologist with over a decade of experience working with adults and children in both public and private settings. My professional background includes extensive work across diverse settings including Community-Based Teams, Disability Services, and both Child and Adolescent and Adult Mental Health Services.

My therapeutic approach is influenced by evidence-based modalities including Internal Family Systems (IFS), Compassion Focused Therapy, and Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT). I believe in creating a safe, supportive environment where clients feel respected and understood, establishing trust through empathetic listening and genuine concern for your wellbeing.

I am committed to providing person-centred care that acknowledges and respects the unique experiences, needs, and goals of each client, working collaboratively to develop effective therapeutic strategies.

approach_cards.title: Compassionate Care
approach_cards.text: I create a safe, supportive space where clients feel respected and understood, establishing trust through empathetic listening and genuine concern for your wellbeing.

approach_cards.title: Evidence-Based Practice
approach_cards.text: My interventions are grounded in scientific research and validated therapeutic methods, ensuring you receive the most effective care for your specific concerns.

approach_cards.title: Holistic Perspective
approach_cards.text: I consider all aspects of your life—mind, body, relationships, and environment—recognising that wellbeing encompasses more than symptom reduction.

approach_cards.title: Collaborative Partnership
approach_cards.text: We work together as active participants in the therapeutic process, establishing goals together and adapting my approach based on your feedback and progress.

professional_standards.intro: I maintain the highest professional standards and credentials:
credentials: Registered with the Psychological Society of Ireland (PSI)
Specialised training in evidence-based therapeutic approaches including CBT, EMDR, IFS, ACT, CFT, and Psychodynamic Psychotherapy
Extensive experience in both public and private healthcare settings
Commitment to ethical practice and confidentiality
professional_standards.closing: I am dedicated to providing high-quality care and continually enhancing my knowledge and skills to better serve my clients.
